title: Plant Hanger
excerpt: Let your plants live their best life — elevated, effortless, and handcrafted with love
materials: Wooden or metal ring (for the top loop)
Terracotta or ceramic pot (to fit inside)
tips: Cut cords 4–5x the desired finished length
Use a square knot pattern for a classic look
